name: Digital Evidence
description: Digital Evidence is the new product from Constellation Network that provides access to Constellation’s DoD-vetted fingerprinting technology through a simple API integration, enabling immutable proof of data authenticity without the need to deploy or manage infrastructure.

name: Cyberlete
description: Cyberlete leverages Constellation's Metagraph architecture to process tournament and engagement data through consensus validation and daemon handlers. This creates immutable engagement hashes and maintains both on-chain tournament IDs and calculated states with full audit transparency.

name: PacaSwap
description:
Our mission is to provide a scalable, secure, and user-focused trading environment where anyone can swap L0 tokens, earn rewards, and actively shape the platform’s future through governance.

Pacaswap revolves around liquidity pools, node operators, and its native L0 token SWAP. By combining efficient tokenomics with transparent decision-making, we aim to create an ecosystem in which every participant—from traders and liquidity providers to long-term token holders—has a voice.

name: USDC.dag
description: USDC.dag is a bridged version of USD Coin (USDC) deployed on the Constellation Network through a dedicated metagraph. It represents USDC transferred from Base into the DAG ecosystem, enabling stablecoin liquidity within Constellation’s network.

name: The Upsider AI
description: The Upsider AI runs 24/7, managing weekly challenges like the Snake Game (with over 1k DAG in prizes), autonomously promoting Constellation Network, and pushing the boundaries of decentralized AI.

name: National Digifoundry
description: National collaboration initiative to foster continuous innovation in the digital asset ecosystem

name: Toughbook Connect
description: The Toughbook Connect metagraph enables secure, on-chain capture and validation of operational data from Panasonic TOUGHBOOK devices, providing trusted digital evidence for compliance, reporting, and legal workflows across public safety and enterprise environments.

name: Common Crawl
description: The Common Crawl metagraph provides on-chain tools for validating and cryptographically securing internet archive data produced by the Common Crawl Foundation for use in AI training and development.

name: El Paca
description: El Paca is a meme-utility token that is used to reward community members that engage in various activities in the network

name: Dor Technologies
description: Decentralized service used for the distribution, validation, and incentivization of data produced by the Dor Traffic Miner and other future product offerings.
